title: ADO Bug Agent Credentials
description: Credentials file used by the ADO Bug Agent MCP server when host environment variables are not available. Default lookup paths: $ADO_BUG_AGENT_CREDENTIALS_FILE, ~/.ado-bug-agent/credentials.json, <cwd>/.ado-bug-agent/credentials.json. The file MUST NOT be committed; PAT contents are sensitive.

orgUrl.description: Azure DevOps organization URL, e.g. https://dev.azure.com/my-org

org.description: Azure DevOps organization short name, used to build https://dev.azure.com/<org> when orgUrl is not set.

pat.description: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token with Work Items Read, Identity Read, Project and Team Read.
